exampleSentences.sentence: The new law was passed in the Parliament.
exampleSentences.gujaratiTranslation: નવો કાયદો સંસદમાં પસાર કરવામાં આવ્યો હતો.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: नया कानून संसद में पारित किया गया।

exampleSentences.sentence: We can see stars from the observatory.
exampleSentences.gujaratiTranslation: આપણે વેધશાળામાંથી તારાઓ જોઈ શકીએ છીએ.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: हम वेधशाला से तारे देख सकते हैं।

exampleSentences.sentence: Scientists conduct experiments in a laboratory.
exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: वैज्ञानिक प्रयोगशाला में प्रयोग करते हैं।

exampleSentences.sentence: The Taj Mahal is a famous monument.

exampleSentences.hindiTranslation: दुबई में कई गगनचुंबी इमारतें हैं।
